artPrompt: A cramped rented storefront campaign office at dusk, forty mismatched folding chairs in crooked rows, a battered coffee maker steaming on a side table, a blank unlettered placard leaning in the window. Warm light spills from a single bare bulb, glinting off the chrome urn while the rest of the room and the wet street outside sink into varnished darkness. No central figure. Rendered as a moody oil painting — old-master chiaroscuro, visible impasto brushwork, deep shadow, warm varnished tones.
name: Recall Headquarters
text:
{T}: Add {C}.
{T}: Add {G} or {W}. Activate only if a Voter, recall, or signature is mentioned on a permanent you control.
{3}, {T}: You gain 1 life for each Voter you control. (The HQ tallies the whole movement and feels great about it.)
flavorText: A rented storefront with a hand-lettered sign, forty folding chairs, and a coffee maker that has seen things.
